zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de la Plaunche於1347年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安時，她的父親William de la Plaunche37歲，母親Elizabeth Hillary18歲。她於1378年3月28日與Sir Robert de Grey在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1423年9月在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安享年76歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de la Plaunche于1347年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安时，她的父亲William de la Plaunche37岁，母亲Elizabeth Hillary18岁。她于1378年3月28日与Sir Robert de Grey在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1423年9月在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安享年76岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Plaunche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Plauché): variant of Plauchier, a nickname from Old Occitan plauchier ‘clumsy’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de la Plaunche was born in 1347, in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, William de la Plaunche, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth Hillary, was 18. She married Sir Robert de Grey on 28 March 1378, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in September 1423, in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de la Plaunche est née en 1347, à Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William de la Plaunche, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hillary, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Grey le 28 mars 1378, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en septembre 1423, à Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de la Plaunche 1347 in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de la Plaunche 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hillary 18. Sie hat am 28. März 1378 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb im September 1423 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Robert de Grey il 28 marzo 1378, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de la Plauncheが1347年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘイバーシャムで生まれた時，父William de la Plauncheは37歳，母Elizabeth Hillaryは18歳であった。1378年3月28日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでSir Robert de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1423年9月にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘイバーシャムで76歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘイバーシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de la Plaunche(이)가 1347년 영국 벅잉함실르 하버샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de la Plaunche(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hillary(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1378년 3월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Sir Robert de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 하버샤에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 하버샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de la Plaunche nasceu em 1347, em Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de la Plaunche, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hillary, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Grey em 28 de março de 1378, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1423, em Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de la Plaunche родилась в 1347 г. в местности хавиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de la Plaunche было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hillary, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Grey 28 марта 1378 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла сентябрь 1423 г. в местности хавиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности хавиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия.
